summary: #89700 is open but preflight marks it security-sensitive, so it should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling. #89756 is an open non-security PR in the same exec config migration family and should be kept related; no close, merge, or fix action is planned in this read-only job.

actions.reason: The issue is explicitly security-sensitive in the live preflight artifact, so ProjectClownfish should not close, label, merge, or fix it.

The PR is useful related work for the routed issue, but it is not merge-ready or closable in this cluster plan because the job blocks merge/fix actions and the hydrated review evidence still contains an unresolved behavior blocker.
